race.comment: Open race to close out the card. LA PROFECIA (6) got the maiden victory out of the way last time out and is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside alley. Gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim and looks the runner in this field with the most upside. Strong winning prospects again. ATLANTIC COAST (3) is one from one over this course and distance and maps ideally for this contest from gate two. Capable of running a bold race. KING COBAMA (9) didn't measure up in town last time out but go on the solid Warwick win two back. Worth another chance. CLUBHOUSE (1) has hit the frame at the past three efforts and may earn some minor money again.
